name: Roger Wicker
stanceSummary: Official Senate floor statements affirm Israel's right to self-defense, and Track AIPAC reports substantial Israel Lobby funding tied to this candidacy.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $1,463,291.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance updates.
Profile updated with official Senate floor speech evidence affirming Israel's right to self-defense.
